global_forbidden_paths: product UI or application runtime files
shared parent README/index/.gitignore files under contracts/step0, contracts/specs, or evidence/step0
collision_gate: Run the proven G-006 sorted changed-path intersection guard across all six accepted commits before integration.

setup_history.error: Heca daemon file-descriptor exhaustion and one reset connection
setup_history.disposition: restart daemon; serialize worktree creation; preserve parallel implementation

setup_history.attempt: agent create with both worktree_id and display name
setup_history.disposition: create each agent with worktree_id, then update display name

setup_history.attempt: serial agent creation followed by name updates

pm_dispositions.finding: R-007 and R-009 require Fable-reviewed semantics.
pm_dispositions.disposition: accepted; each semantic model receives a standing-Fable advisory and PM disposition before Opus/PM acceptance

pm_dispositions.finding: R-001 must not build or mutate substrate merely to manufacture a binary-to-source tie.
pm_dispositions.disposition: accepted; record existing binaries and self-test evidence, fail closed on an unprovable build tie, and name the R-052 closure path

pm_dispositions.finding: Top-level task evidence could be confused with R-043 evidence-contract ownership.
pm_dispositions.disposition: accepted; evidence/step0/<task> is task artifact space only, while evidence schemas remain under contracts/specs and shared parent files are forbidden

pm_dispositions.finding: This wave has no executable consumer for behavioral fixtures.
pm_dispositions.disposition: accepted; fixtures are declarative JSON plus expected outcome, jq/schema checks prove syntax/shape only, and every behavioral claim names its downstream executable task

pm_dispositions.finding: The Workflow-to-Council seam could drift between parallel owners.
pm_dispositions.disposition: accepted; Workflow carries only {councilId,policyId}, Council carries no stage routing, and referential/digest behavior belongs solely to R-011

pm_dispositions.finding: G-007 PM acceptance must precede dispatch.
pm_dispositions.disposition: already satisfied by G-007-pm-gate.json and PASS rows in 08-READINESS.md

pm_dispositions.finding: Integration order and collision guard must be declared.
pm_dispositions.disposition: accepted and frozen in this dispatch record

pm_dispositions.finding: Full-access outer posture needs explicit compensating controls.
pm_dispositions.disposition: accepted; use G-007 posture, exact paths, trailers, clean pre/post review state, diff audit, fresh Opus, and PM gate; never treat this as RDY-20 evidence

pm_dispositions.finding: R-004 must preserve the missing visibility fact and use a deterministic export-digest recipe.
pm_dispositions.disposition: accepted; record the omission as a gap for R-041/R-005 and freeze the exact recipe without changing devloop

pm_dispositions.finding: R-013 is large and needs a pre-agreed internal split seam.
pm_dispositions.disposition: accepted; keep one task but separate identity/auth preflight from worker argv/effective-policy declarations and invoke plan mutation rather than improvisation if it stalls

integration_outcome.next_gate: Continue dependency-ready Step-0 tasks; R-039 still gates product/UI coding.

limitations: This record authorizes only the six named Step-0 tasks.
Declarative contracts are not executable capability proof.
No product or UI coding is authorized before R-039 passes.
No dependency modification is authorized by this wave.
